issue_summary_zh: (1)DEF増加 / (2)発動回数に応じて追加でDEF増加 should be two components, but parser treated probability text as content and split into three components.
parser_failure_zh: Probability values with labels were parsed as value/content; percent sign may have been lost. Check fullwidth/halfwidth or mixed parentheses/percent handling.
suggested_rule_zh: Normalize fullwidth/halfwidth parentheses and percent signs before parsing; labeled probability columns belong to probability, not value_raw. Do not create activation_probability_boost unless probability itself is the effect.

issue_summary_zh: Lv30 parsed but Lv50 missing, which should be an automatic parse error/review trigger.
parser_failure_zh: Component values are incomplete at key practical level Lv50.
suggested_rule_zh: If any component has Lv30 but lacks Lv50 while the skill table has Lv50, add review_reason=key_level_component_missing and classify needs_parser_rule.

issue_summary_zh: Line break before condition 'coolとecoのみ編成' caused parsing drift. Expected (1) fixed damage and (2) damage reduction; both conditioned on cool/eco-only formation.
parser_failure_zh: Condition text split by line break was not attached to both labeled effects.
suggested_rule_zh: Normalize line breaks in condition/effect cells and support multi-attribute filters, e.g. attributes=[cool, eco] with formation_only=true.

issue_summary_zh: Actual semantics are three effects: DEF増加 / ATK減少 / 固定軽減. Parser generally found the right idea but scattered them into four slots.
parser_failure_zh: Component split over-fragmented a multi-effect description.
suggested_rule_zh: Support negative ATK/DEF as debuff kinds and merge duplicate fragments by condition label and effect_kind.

issue_summary_zh: Parser output collapsed or misread labeled effects; needs recheck after labeled probability/value separation.
parser_failure_zh: Labeled components and probabilities appear mis-assigned.
suggested_rule_zh: Re-run after #125-style labeled probability normalization; if still ambiguous, add snippet/manual review.

issue_summary_zh: Special case where (1)(2) are combined together. If not easily generalized, flag for manual handling rather than forcing parser guesses.
parser_failure_zh: Compound label syntax such as '(1)(2)' is ambiguous for component splitting.

issue_summary_zh: Skill has different trigger direction: active access by own team and accessed event on station currently held by self. This should be an explicit trigger dimension.
parser_failure_zh: Access direction/ownership condition is not represented enough for solver usage.
suggested_rule_zh: Extend trigger_conditions with access_direction/accessed_direction and station_ownership context, e.g. access_event=own_access or own_link_accessed.

issue_summary_zh: Parser recognized labels but only emitted one component, which is clearly incomplete.
parser_failure_zh: Labeled effect count and emitted component count mismatch.
suggested_rule_zh: If labeled condition/effect rows contain multiple labels but parsed component count is lower, add review_reason=labeled_component_count_mismatch.

issue_summary_zh: Lv30/Lv50 blanks indicate parser failure and should trigger review automatically.
parser_failure_zh: Key practical levels missing from component values.
suggested_rule_zh: Treat blank Lv30 or Lv50 cells in the report as a parser health check failure when the source skill table has those rows.

issue_summary_zh: Parsed (2) but only filled one skill component; expected multiple labeled components.
parser_failure_zh: Label detection did not correspond to component emission.
suggested_rule_zh: Add labeled_component_count_mismatch check and keep record in needs_parser_rule until components match labels.
